Your Personal Morning Dashboard

James' Morning Briefing

Sunday, March 22, 2026
Top Story

Trump threatens attacks on Iran's power plants over opening Strait of Hormuz

President Trump threatens to 'obliterate' Iranian power plants if Tehran fails to open the Strait of Hormuz, escalating tensions in the Middle East.

Read Full Story →

World News

Trump threatens attacks on Iran's power plants over opening Strait of Hormuz

President Trump threatens to 'obliterate' Iranian power plants if Tehran fails to open the Strait of Hormuz, escalating tensions in the Middle East.

Associated Press · News · Read more

Iran threatens to retaliate against Gulf energy and water systems

Iran said it would strike the energy and water systems of its Gulf neighbours in retaliation if U.S. attacks occur.

Reuters · News · Read more

Iranian missile strikes near Israeli nuclear facility

Iranian missile strikes hit near an Israeli nuclear facility, with 75 people receiving treatment including ten severely injured.

BBC News · News · Read more

Paris and Marseille in focus as French vote in local election runoffs

French voters went to the polls to elect mayors in Paris, Marseille and more than 1,500 other cities and towns, testing the far right's strength.

Reuters · News · Read more

Seattle News

Seattle Mariners Opening Day 2026 Approaching

The Seattle Mariners' 2026 season Opening Day is scheduled for March 26 against the Cleveland Guardians at T-Mobile Park. This marks the 50th season in franchise history.

KING 5 / Wikipedia · Read more

Sound Transit 2 Line Crosslake Connection Opening March 28

The Crosslake Connection for the Sound Transit 2 Line is scheduled to open on March 28, 2026, completing the connection across Lake Washington and linking Seattle to the Eastside. New stations at Mercer Island and Judkins Park will provide connections between Seattle and Bellevue/Redmond.

Seattle.gov / Sound Transit · Read more

Seattle Kraken Lose 5-2 to Columbus Blue Jackets

The Seattle Kraken fell to the Columbus Blue Jackets 5-2 on Saturday, March 21. Columbus scored three times in the first period and extended their point streak to 12 games. The Kraken have now lost 4 straight games and tumbled out of a playoff spot.

NHL / ESPN · Read more

Skagit Valley Tulip Festival May Begin Early Due to Warm Weather

The 2026 Skagit Valley Tulip Festival may begin earlier than usual this year due to warmer weather patterns. The festival is a major spring attraction for Seattle-area residents.

Tulip Festival Organization · Read more

Sports

Seattle Mariners (MLB)

Opening Day Just 3 Days Away; Roster Decisions Finalized

The Mariners are just three sleeps away from Opening Day on March 26 against Cleveland. Final roster decisions made, Colt Emerson reassigned to minors.

Randy Arozarena and Cal Raleigh Settle Their 'Beef'

The two Mariners stars released mutual statements putting their public disagreement behind them.

Opening Day: March 26 vs Cleveland Guardians at T-Mobile Park

  • Colt Emerson reassigned to minor league camp after impressive spring
  • Randy Arozarena and Cal Raleigh settled their public disagreement
  • First Mariners commercial of 2026 released featuring Dan Wilson and Bryce Miller
  • Former Mariners Ty France makes Padres Opening Day roster
  • Dylan Moore signs MLB deal with Philadelphia Phillies
Next: March 26 - Opening Day vs Cleveland Guardians

Read more

Seattle Seahawks (NFL - Super Bowl 60 Champions)

Seahawks Exercise Fifth-Year Options on JSN and Devon Witherspoon

Seahawks lock in 2023 first-rounders through 2027. JSN's option: $23.85M, Witherspoon's: $21.16M. Both fully guaranteed.

Big News: Seahawks exercised fifth-year options for two young stars — WR Jaxon Smith-Njigba ($23.8M for 2027) and CB Devon Witherspoon ($21.1M for 2027).

Smith-Njigba was first-team All-Pro, led NFL in receiving yards (1,793), and won AP Offensive Player of the Year — only the second Seahawk ever after Shaun Alexander.

Re-signed: CB Josh Jobe (3yr/$24M), WR Rashid Shaheed (3yr/$51M)

Lost: Boye Mafe to Bengals, Coby Bryant to Bears, Ken Walker III to Chiefs

Draft: Being linked to CB Chris Johnson in early mock drafts after losing Riq Woolen to Eagles.

Last: W 29-13 - Super Bowl 60 Champions! vs New England Patriots

Read more

Seattle Kraken (NHL)

Kraken Lose 5-2 to Blue Jackets - Playoff Hopes Fading

Third straight loss. Now 2 points behind Nashville for final playoff spot with 13 games remaining. Jared McCann injured.

Kraken have lost 4 straight games and tumbled out of a playoff spot.

Now 2 points behind Nashville Predators for final wild card spot with only 13 games remaining.

Last: L 5-2 vs Columbus Blue Jackets
Next: Next game soon vs TBD

Read more

Seattle Sounders FC (MLS)

Sounders Advance to Concacaf Champions Cup Quarterfinals

Beat Vancouver 5-2 on aggregate. Play Minnesota United today at 11:30 AM PT. Will face Tigres UANL next.

Advanced to Concacaf Champions Cup Quarterfinals with 2-1 win over Vancouver (5-2 aggregate).

Playing Minnesota United TODAY at 11:30 AM PT

Last: W 2-1 (5-2 agg) vs Vancouver Whitecaps
Next: TODAY 11:30 AM PT vs Minnesota United

Dining

Revel
Fremont · Korean Fusion · $
Chef Rachel Yang's creative Korean comfort food with a massive open kitchen. Perfect for sharing and the energy is always buzzing.
Reserve Table
The Ballard Cut
Ballard · Steakhouse · $$
Farm-to-table steakhouse with an incredible Japanese whiskey selection. Upscale but approachable, great for a celebratory night.
Reserve Table
Grappa
Queen Anne · Italian · $
Upper Queen Anne's hidden gem with fresh handmade pasta and an extensive grappa and wine list. Intimate and perfect for date night.
Reserve Table
